ExploreCategoriesPage.communityBody: Ask the community. Someone nearby probably has exactly that oddly specific thing you need.
ExploreCategoriesPage.communityTitle: Can’t find what you’re looking for?
ExploreCategoriesPage.diyBody: That hammer drill you need for 15 minutes a year. Here it is.
ExploreCategoriesPage.electronicsBody: Projectors for movie nights or cameras for the trip of a lifetime.
ExploreCategoriesPage.eventsBody: Parties, weddings, or simple dinners with friends that got out of hand.
ExploreCategoriesPage.kidsBody: They grow too fast to buy everything new, right?
ExploreCategoriesPage.kitchenBody: Why buy a dehydrator if you are not even sure what it is?
ExploreCategoriesPage.popHeroSubheadline: Share what you have, rent what you need. More space at home, less waste, and a community of neighbors ready to help.
ExploreCategoriesPage.popHeroTitle: Everything you want, <accent>for the time you need.</accent>
ExploreCategoriesPage.schemaDescription: Browse rental categories on Leaz and find tools, garden equipment, baby gear, sport items, kitchen appliances, and event essentials near you.
ExploreCategoriesPage.sportBody: For that sudden paddle obsession that will last two weeks.
FaqPage.accountA1: Open account settings from your profile menu and update details under security or contact.
FaqPage.accountA2: In preferences you can choose which alerts you get for requests, messages, and updates.
FaqPage.accountQ1: How do I change my email or password?
FaqPage.answer1: Choose your dates on the listing calendar and tap "Request booking". Once the owner accepts, your rental is confirmed.
FaqPage.answer2: Report it right away through the platform and message the owner. Security deposits, insurance, and specific terms are shown on the listing and rental conditions.
FaqPage.answer3: You can pay with the cards and methods enabled by the marketplace at checkout. Details appear before you pay.
FaqPage.answer4: Open the booking from your account and use cancel if it’s available. Refunds and fees depend on the listing rules and how close you are to the start date.
FaqPage.catRentBody: Find, book, and manage your rentals.
FaqPage.ctaSubtitle: Our support team can help at every step of your Leaz experience.
FaqPage.lendA1: Use “List an item”, add photos, description, price, and availability, then submit. We’ll confirm when it’s live.
FaqPage.lendA2: In the listing form you can set rates (e.g. per day) and, if needed, a security deposit. You can update these anytime.
FaqPage.lendA3: We notify you when a request arrives: accept or decline from chat or your bookings section.
FaqPage.lendQ1: How do I publish a listing?
FaqPage.lendQ2: How do I set price and deposit?
FaqPage.lendQ3: How do I handle rental requests?
FaqPage.question1: How do I book an item?
FaqPage.question2: What if the item gets damaged?
FaqPage.question4: How do I cancel a booking?
FaqPage.rentA3: Payment follows the checkout terms: the amount is usually authorised or charged on confirmation or at rental start, as shown on the listing.
FaqPage.safetyA3: Profiles follow marketplace rules. Report suspicious behaviour from the help area.
FaqPage.schemaDescription: Answers about renting, listings, payments, and your Leaz account.

NewLandingPage.heroSub: Rent what you need from the people around you. From a drill for an hour to a stroller for two weeks — without buying, without wasting.
NewLandingPage.heroSubtitle: The first marketplace for sustainable, secure rentals for every occasion.
NewLandingPage.howStep1Body: Enter the item, city, and dates. See availability, prices, and reviews near you.
NewLandingPage.howStep2Body: Integrated chat with the owner, secure payment, and insurance included on every rental.
NewLandingPage.howStep3Body: Meet in person or get it delivered. When you're done, return it and leave a review.
NewLandingPage.partnersSubtitle: Trusted by leading brands and organisations.
NewLandingPage.popularSubtitle: The most requested items from our community.
NewLandingPage.schemaDescription: Leaz is the marketplace where you can rent everything you need, only for the time you need it.
NewLandingPage.testimonial1Quote: I needed a pressure washer for a weekend. Found one 3 metro stops away for €15. Crazy I hadn't done it sooner.
NewLandingPage.testimonial2Quote: My drill was gathering dust. In two months it already paid for a trip to Lisbon.
NewLandingPage.testimonial3Quote: We rented a gazebo, tables, and audio for our daughter's birthday. All delivered to our door.
NewLandingPage.trust1Body: Every rental is covered up to €2,500 against theft and accidental damage. Zero paperwork.
NewLandingPage.trust2Body: ID and phone number confirmed. You always know who you're dealing with.
NewLandingPage.trust3Body: The owner receives payment only after you pick up the item. Refund guaranteed.
NewLandingPage.trustTitle: Rent with the same peace of mind as a hotel.
NewLandingPage.valuePropCommunityDesc: Reduce your environmental impact by renting from people in your area. Community is sustainability.
NewLandingPage.valuePropEasyDesc: Rent in a few clicks. Intuitive interface and fast checkout for every need.
NewLandingPage.valuePropSectionSubtitle: Our platform is designed to offer a stress-free rental experience, focused on quality and community.
NewLandingPage.valuePropSecureDesc: Insurance included on every rental and verified profiles to give you peace of mind.
